narrative:
South Amherst Village has 1,061 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
